Item.Question: Did you bring a movie to watched?
To rest is all Victor wants to do.
Danielle left a while ago to visit the cemetery.
Would you like to swim after the sun goes down?
I approached Carl but he refused to talked to me.
You need a towel to wash your self with.
Instead, Michael chose to staying behind with his friends.
Did Ryan really ask to be called first?
I can't believe Max agreed to help me with my homework.
Julia can't bear to stare at the dirty house.
Dan stopped quickly to studying the fish in the pond.
I hope you have a book to read while we wait.
To taking deep breaths will help you calm down.
I told Marie a hundred times. But she refuses to believe me.
To compares answers after the exam is no use.
Do you intend to submit this paper later?
There are dishes to wash in the kitchen.
Children like pretending to being adults.
To concentrate on the movie is hard to do. It's very long and slow.
Gill arranged to meeting with his friends tonight.
There are more cookies to eat on the table.
My sister promised my parents to cook dinner tonight.
The family decided to spending more time with each other.
To believe the story would be silly, wouldn't it?
Richard gave Sam a ball to played with.
The group failed to realize that they were out of time.
To encourages Mimi is our plan right now.
The letters ceased to arrive last month.
It was then that Sandro started to run fast.
Are these clothes for me to wear?
Ron was dreading to think of what will happen.
To increases our profit is our intention.
Wayne attempted to shoot, but it missed.
Is that medicine for Leila to took later?
To march with everyone at the parade was so much fun.
Brent expected to be done with his chores by afternoon.
Why don't you try to mingles with other people?
Those crayons are not for you to waste.
I'm sorry I failed to let everyone know about the changes.
To observes is our teacher's job, not yours.
